scripts.dev: vite build && { trap 'kill 0' EXIT; vite build --watch & node --inspect=9229 --watch --watch-preserve-output dist/main.js; }
scripts.build: vite build && mkdir -p dist/web && cp -r node_modules/@zircon/web/dist/. dist/web/ && node src/scripts/generate-openapi.ts
scripts.pack: docker build -t ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest . && docker image save --output ./image.tar ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest
scripts.publish: docker image load --input ./image.tar && docker push ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest
